_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Coordinate with other organizations to deconflict reporting.
reference_document_element_description: Manage regulatory data reporting obligations, including data submission preparation, accuracy verification, submission execution, and confirmation documentation.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-002 (OP, cosine: 0.458), DQ-T-016 (DQ, cosine: 0.446).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.8/10 (raw 0.382). Shared vocabulary: [reporting]. DCWF-only terms [coordinate, deconflict, organizations] vs WIDAI-only terms [accuracy, confirmation, data, documentation, execution, manage] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.859 (P=0.870, R=0.849). P exceeds R by 0.021 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 16 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Coordinate with other organizations to deconflict reporting." and "Manage regulatory data reporting obligations, including data submission preparat" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.467 > STS 0.382 (gap +0.085). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [reporting] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.0%. Shared tokens: [reporting]. DCWF-only: [coordinate, deconflict, organizations]. WIDAI-only: [accuracy, confirmation, data, documentation, execution, manage].
